title: 20PCS Universal Petrol Primer Bulb,Petrol Capsule Primer Bulb (19mm / 22mm) Carburetor Primer Bulb Pump Universal Carburetor Oil Cup for Picking Machine Lawn Mower Trimmer Blower Cutter Hedge
features: Household accessories: Carburetor primer bulbs cups are a fuel pump pump bulb mower spare parts for garden and lawn trimmers. It can quickly replace old carburetor oil bubble and save you unnecessary repair costs.
Perfect replacement: 19mm x 15mm and 22mm x 18mm transparent oil bubble carburetor are suitable for most carburetors.
High-quality material: The air purge primer bulb pump is made of high-quality transparent rubber, with soft texture, excellent sealing and durability.

Easy to install: The installation of the primer bulb cup is very simple, no tools are needed, and the model that matches the machine can be selected directly to replace the old petrol primer bulb pump perfectly.

Wide range of uses: Universal replacement primer bulb is a high-quality accessory for general machines. Carburetor bulb is suitable for garden diaphragm carburetor, hedge trimmer, lawn mower, blower, hole punch, paper cutter, hedge device, trimmer chain saw , Pickers, hedge trimmers and various scintillators, etc.
description: Product Description Soft Texture: Made of high-quality transparent rubber, soft, lightweight and durable, and has a high sealing performance, which can help you quickly assemble the repair kit. 19/22 mm: Two sizes can facilitate you to apply and repair various types of machinery and equipment. Easy to Install: Lawnmower primer bulb can be installed without any other tools, which can help you replace old or damaged replacements，simple and convenient, and detachable and easy to clean. Specifications: Product Name: Primer bulb Material: Rubber Color: Clear Please check the size of your machine carefully before buying to avoid any errors. Package Contents: 10 x 19mm Carburetor Primer Bulb 10 x 22mm Carburetor Primer Bulb Primer bulbs widely used in chainsaws, pickers, petrol scrapers, hedge trimmers, cutters, hair strippers, hedge machines, streamers and petrol trimmers, etc., to restore your machine energetic and running smoothly.
